name: 21st
description: Search, install and publish React/shadcn components, themes and templates on 21st.dev from your agent. Bundles the 21st.dev skills — find & install (21st-cli-use), generate & iterate with 21st AI (21st-ai), publish & manage (21st-registry), and publish your design as a theme (21st-design-sync) — and wires up the remote 21st MCP server in one install.
